title: hieracium auriculiforme subsp. auriculare
intro: Hieracium auriculiforme subsp. auriculare is a plant species that is commonly known as the Golden Hawkweed or Hawkweed, which belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Hieracium auriculiforme subsp. auriculare include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in infusions, tinctures, and salves, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
